Air mass meter. Automatic glow period control unit. Secondary air pump relay. Throttle valve module. Low heat output relay. High heat output relay. Charge pressure control solenoid valve. Crankcase breather heater element. Activated charcoal filter system solenoid valve 1. Secondary air inlet valve. Left electrohydraulic engine mounting solenoid valve. Right electrohydraulic engine mounting solenoid valve. Variable intake manifold chan over valve. Air filter bypass valve. Fuel pressure regulating valve. Fuel metering valve. Secondary air inlet valve 2. Exhaust gas recirculation cooler chan over valve. Oil pressure control valve. Fuel system diagnostic pump

Actuator 1 for camshaft adjustment. up toActuator 8 for camshaft adjustment. Actuator 9 for camshaft adjustment. up toActuator 12 for camshaft adjustment. Continued coolant circulation relay. Additional coolant pump relay. Charge pressure control solenoid valve. Activated charcoal filter system solenoid valve 1. Left electrohydraulic engine mounting solenoid valve. Right electrohydraulic engine mounting solenoid valve. Camshaft control valve 1. Camshaft control valve 2. Turbocharger air recirculation valve. Fuel pressure regulating valve. Fuel metering valve. Intake manifold flap valve. Exhaust camshaft control valve 1. Exhaust camshaft control valve 2. Climatronic coolant sh off valve. Oil pressure control valve. Fuel system diagnostic pump. Charge air cooling pump

Pump for exhaust gas recirculation cooler. Ignition coil 1 with output stage. Ignition coil 2 with output stage. Ignition coil 3 with output stage. Ignition coil 4 with output stage. Ignition coil 5 with output stage. Ignition coil 6 with output stage
Supplementary fuel pump relay. Lambda probe 1 heater after catalytic converter. Lambda probe 2 heater after catalytic converter
Lambda probe heater. Lambda probe 2 heater. Lambda probe 1 heater after catalytic converter
